arts.ttl: 'Flabbergasted' Sarina Wiegman reacts to sudden Jonas Eidevall resignation
arts.sum: After a challenging start to the season for the WSL club, which includes one win from their opening four league games, it was confirmed on Tuesday morning that the Swede had vacated his position as head coach. Less than an hour after news of Eidevall's immediate departure broke, Lionesses boss Wiegman sat down to address the media following the latest squad announcement .

arts.ttl: Arsenal had lost identity under Eidevall but face tough test to find better
arts.sum: The chorus of boos that rang around the Emirates Stadium after Chelsea took a fourth-minute lead against Arsenal on Saturday was evidence of a clear shift in the Women's Super League. The dynamic between clubs and their fans is changing. Supporter power is on the rise.

arts.ttl: Jonas Eidevall paid the price for setting Arsenal an ambition he could not reach
arts.sum: Eidevall’s resignation, after just four games of the Women’s Super League season, shows a new type of pressure has arrived at the top of women’s football

arts.ttl: Jonas Eidevall resigns as Arsenal head coach
arts.sum: Arsenal have confirmed assistant coach Renee Slegers will take charge of the team as interim while they undergo the process of making a permanent appointment. Our focus will now turn to the process of appointing a new head coach, and in the meantime, supporting Renee, as she takes interim charge of the team starting with two important fixtures this week."

arts.ttl: Sarina Wiegman 'flabbergasted' by Arsenal head coach Jonas Eidevall's resignation - as England boss defends Mary Earps ahead of October friendlies
arts.sum: Wiegman, who named her 25-player squad for upcoming friendlies against Germany and South Africa, said she was sad to hear the news about Eidevall.

arts.ttl: Jonas Eidevall resigns as Arsenal Women's manager as Gunners confirm interim replacement
arts.sum: Arsenal Women's head coach Jonas Eidevall resigns from his position after three years in charge and is to be replaced by assistant Renee Slegers.

arts.ttl: Jonas Eidevall resigns as Arsenal women's coach
arts.sum: Jonas Eidevall has resigned as Arsenal manager following a disappointing start to the season, the Women's Super League club announced in a statement on Tuesday.

arts.ttl: Parker earns England recall as James and Wubben-Moy return
arts.sum: Aston Villa defender Lucy Parker has earned a Lionesses recall as Lauren James and Lotte Wubben-Moy both return for international friendly fixtures against Germany and South Africa later this month.

arts.ttl: Arsenal confirm Jonas Eidevall exit as head coach resigns with immediate effect
arts.sum: Jonas Eidevall has left his role as head coach of the Arsenal women's team after handing in his resignation with assistant coach Renée Slegers taking charge on an interim basis.

arts.ttl: Jonas Eidevall resigns as Arsenal boss after poor start to Women’s Super League season
arts.sum: The Gunners are languishing in sixth in the WSL and were thumped by Bayern Munich in the Champions League, causing the Swedish coach to leave the club
